steps.text: Employers must provide training for employees on hazards and safety precautions.
Training programs must include information on hazardous materials, safe practices, and emergency procedures.
Employees should be trained on using personal protective equipment (PPE).
Provide initial training before employees engage in hazardous tasks.
Conduct refresher training for employees at least annually.
Document all training provided to employees.
Establish an emergency action plan that includes training employees on procedures.
Review the emergency action plan with employees when changes occur.
Maintain records of hazardous materials training and ensure accessibility.
